query: Swiss Riz Casimir curry rice with chicken, fruit, cream, and toasted almonds

draft.title: Riz Casimir
draft.description: Swiss Riz Casimir curry rice with chicken, fruit, cream, and toasted almonds, perfect for a flavorful family meal.

steps.text: Rinse the basmati rice under cold water until water runs clear. Cook rice in salted boiling water or chicken stock according to package instructions, about 12-15 minutes. Drain and keep warm.
Heat vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add chicken pieces to the pan and cook until lightly browned and cooked through, about 8-10 minutes.
Stir in curry powder and cook for 1 minute to release aroma.
Add chicken stock and bring to a simmer. Cook for 5 minutes until sauce slightly thickens.
Stir in cream, chopped apricot, and sliced banana. Simmer gently for 3-5 minutes to combine flavors. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Toast sliced almonds in a dry pan over medium heat until golden and fragrant, about 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Serve the curry sauce over the cooked basmati rice and sprinkle toasted almonds on top.
